measurement_note: Size is C, the number of customers. The 32/128/512 tiers span 16x and contain one exact-threshold June order and one exact-threshold July order per customer. The joined conditional aggregation processes the relevant relations together in O(C + P + O log O) time conservatively. A correct pair of correlated monthly subqueries repeatedly rescans orders for each customer, completes at C = 512, and is rejected by scaling.
